title: Pandemic Preparedness and Response
description: This project goal is to provide hybrid, digitally-focused, non-credit Pandemic Preparedness and Response to the minority and populations at large in the Midwest region through a non-credit program.
text:
This project will focus on the implementation of a program to educate and train future leaders to be prepared for the next pandemic and to build on current responses to COVID-19 and emerging variants.
The program will consist of three sections:
